message:
fix(core): gate tantivy modules behind recorder-lexical feature

Add #[cfg(feature = "recorder-lexical")] guards to five tantivy-dependent
modules (tantivy_ingest, tantivy_policy, tantivy_quality, tantivy_query,
tantivy_reindex) that were previously compiled unconditionally.

These modules depend on the tantivy crate which is only available when
the recorder-lexical feature is enabled. Without these guards, default
builds would fail to compile when tantivy is not in the dependency tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
